summary: Comprehensive testing of Studio architectural refactor completed. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Dashboard (Centro di controllo), Campagne page (EditorialPage), and Workflow page with new Sorgente step all working correctly. Resume campaign flow, filters, and save-notes feature tested successfully.

minor.issue: Minor fix applied - course_title field was not returned when course_id was empty

critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard (Centro di controllo) correctly shows campaign pipeline with 4 status counts (Bozza, Pianificazione, In revisione, Esportate)
Dashboard shows recent_campaigns with posts_total, posts_approved progress bars
Campaigns API returns enriched data: posts_total, posts_draft, posts_approved, posts_exported, course_title
EditorialPage (Campagne) shows all campaigns with enriched data, type badges, status badges, and progress
Workflow page has new Step 0 (Sorgente) with 3 source types: course, repository, freeform
Course source shows dropdown, freeform shows URL and Notes textareas
Resume campaign flow works - navigates to correct step and loads campaign data
Save notes to repository dialog working with title and content fields
Sidebar labels updated: 'Centro di controllo', 'Campagne' under PRODUZIONE group
All UI in Italian as required
seed_data_creation: Test notes saved to repository via /api/campaigns/{id}/save-notes endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Studio architectural refactor complete. Key verifications: (1) Dashboard shows campaign pipeline and recent campaigns with progress, (2) Campaigns list shows enriched data with post counts and course_title, (3) Workflow has new Sorgente step with 3 source types, (4) Resume campaign navigates to correct step, (5) Save notes to repository works, (6) Sidebar labels in Italian.

features_verified.dashboard_campaign_pipeline: PASS - Shows campaigns_draft, campaigns_planning, campaigns_review, campaigns_exported
features_verified.dashboard_recent_campaigns: PASS - Shows recent campaigns with posts_total and posts_approved
features_verified.dashboard_stat_cards: PASS - Campagne attive, Post da approvare, Post approvati, Pubblicazioni oggi
features_verified.workflow_source_type_freeform: PASS - Freeform shows URL and Notes fields
features_verified.workflow_resume_campaign: PASS - Resumes at correct step with campaign data
features_verified.workflow_save_notes: PASS - 'Salva note nel repository' dialog works
features_verified.sidebar_centro_di_controllo: PASS - Dashboard nav shows 'Centro di controllo'
features_verified.api_dashboard_stats_200: PASS - Returns campaign pipeline and recent_campaigns
features_verified.api_campaigns_list_enriched: PASS - Returns posts counts and course_title
